text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 166 

PA_IND_CD 

LABEL: Prior Authorization Indicator Code 

DESCRIPTION: This field identifies the indicator assigned by CMS for each prior authorization program to define the 
applicable line of business i.e., Part A, Part B, DME, Home Health and Hospice. 

SHORT NAME: PA_IND_CD 

LONG NAME: PA_IND_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 4 

SOURCE: NCH 

VALUES: The value is a four-digit alpha-numeric code,
